name: CalculationApi
summary: Connection Rest API 3.0 — Calculation endpoints. Auto-generated REST surface; one method per HTTP operation.

methods.name: CalculateAsync
methods.summary: Runs CBFEM calculation and returns the summary of the results.

params.name: projectId
params.doc: The unique identifier of the opened project in the ConnectionRestApi service.

params.name: requestBody
params.doc: List of connection IDs to calculate.

throws.when: Thrown by the SDK when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

params.doc: The unique identifier of the opened project in the ConnectionRestApi service.

params.doc: List of connection IDs to calculate.

throws.when: Thrown by the SDK when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.
